scenario_description: A man in a blue cap moves through different locations on a double-decker bus, starting on the upper deck, moving to the lower deck near a pillar, and finally standing by the exit. The user tracks his movements across three distinct images.

turns.text: Here's the first shot from the top deck.
turns.image_description: Interior of a double-decker bus upper deck. A man wearing a bright blue baseball cap and a grey hoodie is leaning casually against the metal safety railing, looking out the window. To his right, a woman with red hair sits reading a book. The lighting is bright daylight coming from large windows.

turns.text: Got it. He looks pretty relaxed up there. Is he getting off soon?
Looks like he made his way down.
turns.image_description: Interior of the bus lower deck. The same man in the blue cap and grey hoodie is now sitting on a bench seat next to a thick, cream-colored structural pillar. He is looking forward. Behind him, another passenger in a yellow jacket is standing near the aisle. The lighting is slightly dimmer than the upper deck.

turns.text: Ah, he's settled in for a bit. That spot by the pillar seems comfortable.
Bus is slowing down, everyone's grabbing handles.
turns.image_description: Rear section of the bus lower deck near the exit door. The man in the blue cap and grey hoodie is standing upright, holding onto a vertical handrail with his left hand. He is facing the camera. To his immediate right, a different man wearing a green beanie and a black coat is also holding a handrail. Through the open door behind them, a street scene is visible.

turns.text: Yeah, looks like we're approaching a stop. Good thing he's holding on tight.
In the last photo, who is standing directly to the right of the guy I've been following? A) The woman with red hair B) The man in the yellow jacket C) The man in the green beanie D) No one

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: 1. Turn 1 identifies the target entity: a man in a blue cap on the upper deck. 2. Turn 3 confirms this same man (blue cap, grey hoodie) moved to the lower deck and sat by a pillar. 3. Turn 5 shows the same man (blue cap, grey hoodie) standing near the exit. 4. In the image from Turn 5, the person standing immediately to the right of the blue-capped man is a man wearing a green beanie and black coat. 5. The woman with red hair was only in Turn 1 (upper deck). 6. The man in the yellow jacket was only in Turn 3 (behind the seated man), not in Turn 5.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: The model must track the specific 'blue cap' entity across three distinct visual contexts (standing on upper deck, sitting on lower deck, standing at exit) and distinguish him from other passengers who appear in different turns or positions. Specifically, it must reject the 'yellow jacket' distractor who appeared in the middle turn but is absent in the final turn, and correctly identify the 'green beanie' who only appears in the final turn next to the tracked entity.

_meta.scenario: On a double-decker bus, a man wearing a blue cap is initially seen leaning against the railing of the upper deck. Over several turns, he walks down the stairs, sits next to a pillar in the lower deck, and finally stands up to hold onto a handrail near the exit as the bus slows down.
